ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the weather data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the weather data was collected */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity level recorded */,
  "cloudiness" INTEGER /* Cloudiness level recorded */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed recorded */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the weather data */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather type the unit belongs to */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES weather_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data_types" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather type */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the weather data */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id", "type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_types_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities_weather_types" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id", "type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the weather station is located */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the station (e.g., operational, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_stations_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
